Home base, Thu–Sun

The Pewaukee Lake House

Right on the water — navy-blue craftsman with stone accents, a stone fireplace living room facing the lake, and a big farmhouse table for the whole crew. Fire pit and hot tub out back, ping pong and kayaks in the garage, and a pontoon tied up at the dock for boat day.

Waterfront Hot Tub Fire Pit Pontoon Boat Kayaks Ping Pong Big Group Dining
Tap each day for the full playbook

THU · AUG 27

FRI · AUG 28

  • Optional golf or hike
  • Party bus to Brewers vs. Rangers
  • Out on the town in Bay View

SAT · AUG 29

The Draft. Then Boat Day.

  • Fantasy football draft

  • Boat-up lake bars at night

SUN · AUG 30 Recover & head out — slow morning at the house, check out of the VRBO, travel home.
